title: Claude Mythos explained..
summary: Caleb Writes Code reviews Claude Mythos as a frontier model representing a significant intelligence leap similar to o1. The video discusses privatized token access, inference costs, pricing, benchmarks, and broader concerns about token disparity as advanced AI becomes limited to certain companies and use cases.
